description: Interoperability probe results between relay pairs

panels.description: Median RTT per (source, destination) pair. Green = fast, yellow = >24s, red = >48s. Failed pairs show no data (red null color).

targets.expr: (avg_over_time(cmping_rtt_median_seconds{source=~"$source", destination=~"$destination"}[$__range]) > -1) or on(source, destination, probe_type) (avg_over_time(cmping_probe_loss_ratio{source=~"$source", destination=~"$destination"}[$__range]) * 0 / 0)

panels.title: RTT Matrix (Average over Range)

panels.description: All cross-relay pairs with current probe status, median RTT, and p90 RTT.
panels.title: Probe Results

panels.description: Average outbound loss per source host (avg over all destinations). Green=no loss, yellow=>10%, red=>20%.
panels.title: Outbound Loss (avg over destinations)

panels.description: Average inbound loss per destination host (avg over all sources). Green=no loss, yellow=>10%, red=>20%.
panels.title: Inbound Loss (avg over sources)

panels.description: Account setup time per (source, destination) pair. Dark-green = fast (<2s), green = <6s, light-green = <24s, yellow = <48s, red = <60s, dark-red = timeout.
panels.title: Account Setup Time

panels.description: Send error rate per source (sum over destinations). Green=no errors, yellow=rare, orange=frequent, red=high.
panels.title: Send Errors (rate per source)

title: Relay Network: Interoperability Cross-relay
